import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; function LandingPage(){ const [isLoggedIn, setIsLoggedIn] = useState(false); useEffect(() => { setIsLoggedIn(!!localStorage.getItem('token')); }, []); return (

DocGuard

Protect, verify and manage your documents with encryption, watermarking, digital signatures and smart access controls — built for teams and individuals.

{!isLoggedIn ? ( <> Get Started Login ) : ( <> Dashboard Profile )}

What DocGuard Does

DocGuard combines strong encryption, visible and invisible watermarks, signature verification, anomaly detection and robust role-based access to provide end-to-end document security and auditability.

🔒
End-to-end Encryption
Files are encrypted before upload and remain protected in storage.
🖋️
Digital Signatures
Verify authenticity with cryptographic signatures and tamper checks.
💧
Watermarking
Add robust watermarks to discourage leaks and trace distribution.
🔐
Role-based Access
Fine-grained controls to allow viewing, downloading, or sharing per user or group.
⚠️
Anomaly Detection
Smart alerts for suspicious access patterns or failed authentication attempts.
📥
Secure Downloads
Time-limited and auditable downloads to prevent unauthorized distribution.
); } export default LandingPage;
